# Parsify.in

## What is Parsify?
Parsify is a SaaS tool that converts bank statement PDFs and GST data into structured Excel/CSV files for Indian Chartered Accountants (CAs) and accounting professionals.

## Who is it for?
- Chartered Accountants (CAs) in India
- Accounting firms
- Tax consultants
- Finance professionals handling ITR, GST, TDS work

## Key Features
- Bank statement PDF to Excel/CSV conversion
- GST data extraction and structuring
- Bulk processing for multiple clients
- Supports all major Indian bank formats (SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, Kotak etc.)
- Clean structured output ready for Tally, Excel analysis

## Pricing
- Free: 1 statement/day (no signup), 2/day (free account)
- Starter: ₹999/month — 40 statements
- Growth: ₹1,999/month — 120 statements
- Pro: ₹3,499/month — 400 statements

## URL
https://parsify.in
https://app.parsify.in

## Use Cases
- ITR filing preparation
- GST reconciliation
- Loan processing document verification
- Audit trail creation
- Client bank data analysis
